tools.name: fed_rates
tools.description: Federal Reserve interest rates, FOMC meeting calendar, policy outlook.

tools.name: fed_rates_v2
tools.description: [AGENT-NATIVE v2] Fed Funds Rate WITH interpretation layer: signal (hawkish/dovish), regime, percentile_2y/10y, momentum, volatility, confidence, actionable_prompt. Built for autonomous agents that need pre-reasoned data.

tools.name: inflation_v2
tools.description: [AGENT-NATIVE v2] CPI YoY WITH interpretation layer: regime (low/target_zone/elevated/high/crisis), trend (disinflation/sticky/accelerating), percentile, ranked actions array. Built for autonomous agents.

tools.name: yield_curve_v2
tools.description: [AGENT-NATIVE v2] Treasury 10Y-2Y spread WITH interpretation layer: curve_state (deep_inverted/inverted/flat/normal/steep), days_inverted_last_365, recession_imminent detection (un-inversion pattern), ranked actions array.

tools.name: fed_rates_v3
tools.description: [EVIDENCE v1.0] Fed Funds Rate as evidence only. Returns signal_strength, risk_band, reason_codes, allowed/blocked action categories. NO personalised recommendations, NO sizing, NO venue picks. Product positioning: evidence_infrastructure.

tools.name: inflation_v3
tools.description: [EVIDENCE v1.0] CPI YoY as evidence only. Returns signal_strength, risk_band, reason_codes, allowed/blocked action categories. NO personalised recommendations, NO sizing, NO venue picks. Product positioning: evidence_infrastructure.

tools.name: yield_curve_v3
tools.description: [EVIDENCE v1.0] Treasury 10Y-2Y spread as evidence only. Returns signal_strength, risk_band, reason_codes (incl. inversion context), allowed/blocked action categories. NO personalised recommendations, NO sizing, NO venue picks. Product positioning: evidence_infrastructure.

tools.name: macro_coherence_v1
tools.description: [v1.1 AGGREGATOR] Neutral aggregation of fed_rates_v3 + inflation_v3 + yield_curve_v3 in one call. Returns reason-code index, distributions of signal_strength/risk_band/staleness_tier, cross-tool concentration. No directional labels, no alignment score, no venue hints. One call replaces three for ma

tools.name: recession_risk_v1
tools.description: [EVIDENCE v1.1] US recession indicators as evidence only. Returns reason_codes (yield curve state, GDP trend, unemployment trend), signal_strength, risk_band. Rebuilt from retired macroracle in v1.1 evidence-only form — NO recession probability as label, NO LOW_RISK/HIGH_RISK classification.

tools.name: economic_health_v1
tools.description: [EVIDENCE v1.1] US economic health composite (GDP, unemployment, inflation, consumer confidence) as evidence only. Returns reason_codes + signal_strength + risk_band. Rebuilt from retired macroracle — NO regime labels (expansion/contraction/stagflation/goldilocks).

tools.name: consumer_sentiment_v1
tools.description: [EVIDENCE v1.1] Michigan Consumer Sentiment Index as evidence only. Returns reason_codes (relative to baseline 100 and long-run avg ~85), signal_strength, risk_band. Rebuilt from retired macroracle — NO PESSIMISTIC/OPTIMISTIC labels.

tools.name: market_stress_v1
tools.description: [EVIDENCE v1.1] US financial stress composite (VIX, HY spread, TED spread, STLFSI) as evidence only. Returns reason_codes + signal_strength + risk_band. Rebuilt from retired macroracle — NO stress_level categorical (LOW/MODERATE/HIGH/EXTREME).

tools.name: inflation
tools.description: US inflation data: CPI, PCE, core inflation, year-over-year and month-over-month.

tools.name: yield_curve
tools.description: US Treasury yield curve: all maturities (1M-30Y), 10Y-2Y spread, inversion signals, recession probability.

tools.name: labor_market
tools.description: US labor market: unemployment rate, nonfarm payrolls, wages, jobless claims, labor participation.

tools.name: gdp_growth
tools.description: US GDP growth: quarterly and yearly, real GDP, consumer spending, recession risk.

tools.name: housing
tools.description: US housing market: housing starts, permits, median prices, 30Y mortgage rates, home sales.

tools.name: macro_dashboard
tools.description: Full US economic dashboard — all key indicators at once: Fed, inflation, yields, labor, GDP, housing.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Server status, API connectivity.

tools.name: ecb_rates
tools.description: ECB interest rates: Main Refinancing, Deposit Facility, Marginal Lending, EURIBOR 3M/6M/12M, Euro Short-Term Rate.

tools.name: ecb_fx
tools.description: EUR exchange rates vs USD, GBP, JPY, CHF, CNY. Daily from ECB.

tools.name: ecb_inflation
tools.description: Euro Area HICP inflation: headline, core (excl energy+food), Germany.

tools.name: ecb_economy
tools.description: Euro Area economy: GDP growth YoY, unemployment rate, M3 money supply.

tools.name: ecb_yields
tools.description: Euro Area 10Y AAA government bond yield benchmark.

tools.name: ecb_dashboard
tools.description: Full ECB dashboard — rates + FX + inflation + economy + yields in one call.

tools.name: ecb_mica_reserve
tools.description: ECB data relevant for MiCA stablecoin reserve compliance (Art. 24/25/53). Eligible asset rates and yields.

tools.name: ecb_series
tools.description: Fetch any specific ECB data series by ID. 20 series available: rates, FX, inflation, economy, yields.

tools.name: wb_gdp
tools.description: World Bank: Top global economies by GDP with growth rates.

tools.name: wb_country
tools.description: World Bank country economic profile: GDP, inflation, trade balance, population.

tools.name: wb_rwa_context
tools.description: World Bank RWA risk context: economic risk score and key indicators for country risk assessment.

tools.name: bls_employment
tools.description: US employment data direct from Bureau of Labor Statistics: unemployment rate, nonfarm payrolls, labor participation, hourly earnings, labor force.

tools.name: bls_inflation
tools.description: US CPI inflation direct from BLS: headline CPI-U index and core CPI (less food & energy).

tools.name: bls_series
tools.description: Fetch any BLS data series. Available: unemployment_rate, cpi_all, cpi_core, nonfarm_payrolls, labor_participation, avg_hourly_earnings, labor_force.
